# jamfschool Provider

The Jamf School provider allows you to manage resources in Jamf School.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Configure the Jamf School provider.
# Prefer environment variables for credentials:
#   JAMFSCHOOL_URL, JAMFSCHOOL_NETWORK_ID, JAMFSCHOOL_API_KEY
provider "jamfschool" {
  url        = "https://myschool.jamfcloud.com"
  network_id = "10482058"
  api_key    = "your-api-key-here"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The API key used for authentication, generated at Organization > Settings > API in Jamf School. Can also be set with the `JAMFSCHOOL_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `network_id` (String) The Network ID used for API authentication, found at Devices > Enroll Device(s) in Jamf School. Can also be set with the `JAMFSCHOOL_NETWORK_ID` environment variable.
- `url` (String) The base URL of your Jamf School instance (e.g. `https://myschool.jamfcloud.com`). Can also be set with the `JAMFSCHOOL_URL` environment variable.
